review_items.description: Verify every behavioral claim against the source map and WordPress Core commit.
Use page front matter and script-modules-page-specs.json for section order, parent-child links, and labels.
Use title, slug, section, topic, keywords, and search_weight from front matter/page specs.
The repo has a recipe and docs-agent bundle reference but no local committed command that runs WP Codebox/docs-agent generation for this target.
